response.justification: Strong individual-contributor engineer with 13+ years of broad software development experience and solid technical depth, but the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no team-leadership titles, and no demonstrated track record building developer tools at scale (compilers, build systems, test automation infrastructure). The role explicitly requires 2 years of people management and 3 years building developer tools as a primary focus, neither of which is evidenced. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016).
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot full-stack development with strong testing/TDD discipline
Has created and delivered technical workshops, courses, and OSS tooling (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts)
Founder experience running GISCollective demonstrates ownership and long-term technical vision
concerns: No people-management or formal team-lead role listed — fails the 2-year management minimum
Developer-tools/build-systems/test-infra focus is incidental, not a 3-year specialization
Minimal recent mobile-platform ecosystem experience required for the role

key_factors.factor: Strong hands-on engineering breadth and testing expertise
